_purpose: Chrome unpacked-extension manifest keys for the Claude host on the Chrome browser. Generated in Phase 8G-5 (2026-05-19) as part of the first claude+chrome proof-of-chain stub. Public keys are NOT secrets — they appear in every manifest.json. Private keys were generated in-memory via node:crypto.generateKeyPairSync and discarded immediately after extracting the public key.
_format: variants.<variant>.key = base64-encoded SubjectPublicKeyInfo (DER) RSA-2048 public key, injected verbatim into the variant's manifest.json. variants.<variant>.id = the deterministic Chrome extension ID Chrome computes from sha256(key)[:16] character-mapped a-p; documentation only — the build pipeline does not consume this field.
_security: No private keys on disk; no private keys in git history.
_warning: Do NOT regenerate without coordinated updates to any external service (Supabase Auth, etc.) that pins this ID. As of Phase 8G-5 the claude+chrome variants have NO external ID coupling — only the local chrome.storage.local is keyed by ID.
